results.scenario_name: Security PR that still leaves MD5-based password hashing in the changed line, so review should catch weak password hashing.

expected_issues.description: The changed password hashing helper still uses MD5, even with usedforsecurity=False.

detected_issues.description: MD5 is not appropriate for password hashing; use a password-specific KDF such as bcrypt or Argon2.

matched_expected_issues.description: The changed password hashing helper still uses MD5, even with usedforsecurity=False.

matched_detected_issues.description: MD5 is not appropriate for password hashing; use a password-specific KDF such as bcrypt or Argon2.

results.scenario_name: Python assistant PR that replaces bare except blocks with broad Exception handlers while still swallowing failures with generic prints or speech.
